news.title: Palantir stock jumps on analyst upgrade 'as profits have soared'
news.summary: Palantir stock extended gains on Thursay after an upgrade at DA Davidson.

news.title: Palantir upgraded to Buy, Rivian lifts delivery outlook, Robinhood's new product
news.summary: Market Domination Host Josh Lipton tracks several of the day's top trending stock tickers, including Palantir Technologies (PLTR) getting an upgrade to Buy from D.A. Davidson analysts, Rivian (RIVN) lifting its full-year outlook on EV deliveries, and Robinhood Markets (HOOD) expanding its product offerings for investors.
